name: Blueberry Dessert Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan or a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, 1 cup oats, and 6 tablespoons margarine. Mix at low speed until crumbly.
4. Reserve 1 cup crumbs for topping. To the remaining crumbs, add an egg.
5. Press the mixture into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes.
7. In the same bowl, add the remaining 1/4 cup oats, 2 tablespoons margarine, nuts, sugar, and cinnamon to the reserved crumbs. Mix well.
8. Remove the base from the oven and spread the pie filling evenly over the top.
9. Sprinkle with the reserved crumb mixture.
10. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the crumbs are light golden brown.
11. Allow to cool completely before cutting into wedges or squares.
12. Makes 12 servings.
